name: LookupMeasuredEvent
title: LookupMeasuredEvent
description: Searches for the specified measured event. The path must be complete including namespaces and both endpoints: (Namespace::)+Service.measure[consumer,provider].Event.
You can downcast the result to a concrete type, see the example.
return: The measured event. An uninitialized object if the event is not found, which will also be reported in the Write Window or as an error in test system (if the function is called in a test routine).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
